_comment: REFERENCE ONLY. The authoritative modality.json is GENERATED by Stage 3 (stage3_export/convert_hdf5_to_lerobot.py -> write_meta) into <dataset>/meta/modality.json, and that generated file is the one GR00T's lerobot_episode_loader consumes. This file mirrors the same flat video/state/action/annotation schema so edits stay in sync; dims (51) and action delta_indices (range(action_horizon), default 40) are filled from the actual recording at convert time.
